entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: The crop species Eleusine coracana subsp. coracana, with 138 accessions evaluated.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Ten important phenotypic characteristics evaluated in the field.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in genetic makeup identified through morphological and molecular data.

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation within the finger millet accessions.

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying associations between genetic markers and traits.

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A crop improvement strategy utilizing genomic data for selection.

entities.name: WEIGHTED NEIGHBOUR-JOINING BASED CLUSTERING
entities.description: A molecular data-based clustering method used to group accessions.

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL CLUSTERING
entities.description: A phenotypic trait-based clustering method used to group accessions.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: Studies used to identify significant associations between markers and traits across the genome.

entities.name: MICROSATELLITE MARKERS
entities.description: A set of 20 molecular markers used for characterization.

entities.name: ALLELES
entities.description: Alternative forms of genes, with 222 detected, including rare alleles.

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATION
entities.description: The relationship between a genetic marker and a specific phenotypic trait.

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A measure of the informativeness of a genetic marker.
